The ABI and factory pattern are standard. Therefore, malware score should remain **0**.\n\n- **Obfuscated score justification:**  \n  The code is straightforward, with no obfuscation or complex dynamic code. Obfuscated score should be **0**.\n\n- **Security risk score justification:**  \n  The code is a simple factory wrapper, not handling user input directly or executing any untrusted code. The slight variation (0.1) in one report is acceptable but perhaps slightly overestimating. A more accurate score would be **0**.\n\n---\n\n### Final Recommendations:\n- **Malware score:** **0** — no malicious behavior detected.\n- **Obfuscated score:** **0** — code is clear and standard.\n- **Risk score:** **0** — no security risk present.\n\n---\n\n### Summary:\nThe reports are consistent and accurate in their assessment.
